chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1209 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.5262/2022. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For hearing of M.A. No.4693/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 13.04.2022 Mrs. Razia Ali Zaman Patoli, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. The petitioner by way of instant petition under the garb of harassment has sought for direction against the respondents to partition the property left by her late husband. If the petitioner is having right over the property left by her late husband then she has to prove such right first in accordance with law and then to ask for its partition and separate possession. Therefore, the direction sought for by the petitioner involving factual controversy could not be issued by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction under the garb of harassment; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine along-with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
